creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=51012f8fa86d27d22bcf6c55b7a94f195510f16f

commit 51012f8fa86d27d22bcf6c55b7a94f195510f16f
Author:     Torsten Zuehlsdorff <tz@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2024-07-10 09:43:10 +0000
Commit:     Torsten Zuehlsdorff <tz@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-07-10 09:43:10 +0000

    net-p2p/prowlarr: Upgrade from 1.19.0.4568 to 1.20.1.4603

      Changelog:

        * Minor fixes and cover link for SubsPlease
        * Avoid invalid requests for Nebulance
        * Fixed: (Nebulance) Improve searching by release names
        * New: Enable "Sync Anime Standard Format Search" by default for new Sonarr apps
        * Minor improvements to season parsing from titles for AnimeBytes
        * Avoid NullRef for missing filelist and tags fields
        * New: (Nebulance) Improvements for season and episode searching
        * Fixed: Trimming disabled logs database
        * Bump version to 1.20.1
        * New: (UI) Indexer privacy label [ #2132 ]

      Taken from:

        https://github.com/Prowlarr/Prowlarr/releases/tag/v1.20.1.4603

    PR:             280197
    Approved by:    Michiel van Baak Jansen <michiel@vanbaak.eu> (maintainer)

 net-p2p/prowlarr/Makefile  |  2 +-
 net-p2p/prowlarr/distinfo  |  6 +++---
 net-p2p/prowlarr/pkg-plist | 12 ++++++------
 3 files changed, 10 insertions(+), 10 deletions(-)
